title: 证据可串成供应链投毒到运行期异常的攻击路径
description: 高危依赖、CI/CD 构建关系、产物部署和运行期异常日志位于同一条可达路径上。
conclusion: 能串成一次高度可信的真实攻击路径：入口、构建、产物、运行期行为连续可达，综合置信度 79%。
recommendation: 隔离高危依赖，使用干净 runner 重新构建，校验产物哈希，并排查运行期外联。

path_steps.why_abusable: A poisoned dependency can run install-time behavior or influence generated artifacts.
path_steps.trust_basis: Not trusted without provenance tying materials to the produced artifact.

path_steps.why_abusable: A compromised step or builder can produce a modified artifact.
path_steps.trust_basis: Needs provenance/attestation with subject digest, builder identity, and materials.

path_steps.why_abusable: Workspace runtime metadata links the build artifact to the deployed service.
Runtime logs show whether the build-time risk manifested after deployment.
path_steps.trust_basis: Stronger when timestamps align with deployment and multiple log sources agree.

evidence_summary.title: npm:axios@1.6.8
evidence_summary.detail: OSV: GHSA-35jp-ww65-95wh; OSV: GHSA-3g43-6gmg-66jw; OSV: GHSA-3p68-rc4w-qgx5; OSV: GHSA-3w6x-2g7m-8v23; OSV: GHSA-43fc-jf86-j433; OSV: GHSA-445q-vr5w-6q77; OSV: GHSA-4hjh-wcwx-x...

trust_chain.subject: npm:axios@1.6.8

trust_chain.claim: 构建步骤将 material 转换为 product
trust_chain.subject: 构建脚本执行

trust_chain.claim: 产物需要 subject digest、builder identity 和 materials provenance
trust_chain.subject: 3cx-supply-chain build
trust_chain.basis: SLSA/in-toto style product node connecting CI steps to runtime deployment.

trust_chain.claim: 运行期行为证明风险可能已经触发
trust_chain.subject: egress

gaps: 路径关系可达，但部分边是启发式关联；建议补充时间线、产物哈希或来源 IP 证据。

choke_points.label: npm:axios@1.6.8
choke_points.action: 固定私有源、锁定版本并清理缓存包。

choke_points.label: 构建脚本执行
choke_points.action: 收敛权限、固定 Action 到 commit SHA，并使用干净 runner。

choke_points.label: 3cx-supply-chain build
choke_points.action: 重新构建并校验产物哈希/provenance。

choke_points.label: 3cx-supply-chain runtime
choke_points.action: 回滚或隔离服务实例，保留日志和镜像证据。

choke_points.label: egress
choke_points.action: 封禁相关来源/目的地址并扩大同时间窗排查。

title: 证据可串成构建链路完整性受损路径
description: CI/CD 风险通过 SLSA/in-toto 的 step -> product 关系影响产物可信度，并继续到运行资产。
conclusion: 能串成构建完整性风险路径，但还需要 provenance/attestation 才能证明产物确被篡改，综合置信度 62%。
recommendation: 收敛 workflow 权限，第三方 Action 固定到 commit SHA，并为产物增加 provenance/attestation。

path_steps.why_abusable: A compromised step or builder can produce a modified artifact.
path_steps.trust_basis: Needs provenance/attestation with subject digest, builder identity, and materials.

path_steps.why_abusable: Workspace runtime metadata links the build artifact to the deployed service.
